entries.title: Commentary on Jeremiah on jeremiah 32:42
entries.excerpt: (Verse 42) What does the Lord say about this: just as I brought upon this people all this great evil, so I will bring upon them all the good that I promise to them. These things, although they may have happened literally after the return from the Chaldeans, when the people returned to Judaea under the reign of Cyrus the king, are more truly and fully fulfilled spiritually in Christ and the Apostles.
